notes: v1.14.34 — SPECTRUM city-dot brightness +1 notch. The night-globe city-light emission was dim in the v1.14.33 desktop render; bumped the per-dot color multiplier nbr from (0.50 + lf*0.60) to (0.62 + lf*0.75), ~+25% across the dim-town-to-metro range, kept deliberately conservative to respect the DPR3-OLED additive pile-to-white risk. Single-knob change in the SHOW_SPECTRUM_LAND dot-build loop; dot size, density, twinkle, palette, night shader, hubs/arcs all unchanged from v1.14.33. Cache-bumped on purpose so the SW force-evicts stale bytes during John's active device-verification pass. node --check 3/3 inline + sw.js PASS, four stamps lockstep v1.14.34, no CSS touched (block-0 brace baseline 2760 unaffected). DEVICE-GATE (John, iPhone after SW-cache-clear): do dense clusters now glow without blowing out to white? If still too dim, bump again; if hot, ease back.
